def process_items(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for item in items:
        validator = lambda x: x.get("status") == "active" and x.get("amount", 0) > 0
        if validator(item):
            results.append(item)
    return results


def transform_records(records: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    output = []
    for record in records:
        formatter = lambda r: f"{r['name']} ({r['id']})"
        output.append(formatter(record))
    return output


def filter_and_sort(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    filtered = []
    for item in items:
        check = lambda x: x["priority"] > 3 and x["active"]
        if check(item):
            filtered.append(item)
    return filtered
